briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the Iic device and driver as a design example.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XIicPs driver.
This function sends and receives data as a smbus master in interrupt driver mode of the IIC.

BaseAddress
contains the base address of the device
XST_SUCCESS if successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE.
-In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration. -This function contains an infinite loop such that if interrupts are not working it may never return.

briefdescription.para: This function writes a buffer of data to the smbus slave.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address of XIicPs instance.
contains the number of bytes to write.
contains the address of send buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command and reads a buffer of data from the smbus slave.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address of XIicPs instance.
contains the number of bytes to read.
contains the address of receive buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing to handle data events from the IIC.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context such that the amount of processing performed should be minimized.
This handler provides an example of how to handle data for the IIC and is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: contains a callback reference from the driver, in this case it is the instance pointer for the IIC driver.
contains the specific kind of event that has occurred.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the example.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This example can run on zynqmp / versal platform evaluation board and IIC controller configured as master in interrupt-driven mode and Aardvark Analyzer used as slave.

detaileddescription.para: It sends and receives the data using IIC master device for SMBus transfers.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm 06/30/22 First release 3.18 gm 07/14/23 Added SDT support. 3.22 bkv 07/09/25 Fixed GCC Warnings. 3.23 vlt 12/17/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
